hair.description: Hair textures from etc/AvatarSample_A.vrm (4 hair parts with color, shade/alpha, shared normal)
hair.note: Hair color can be changed by swapping these textures or tinting via material uniforms

textures.name: hair_01_color
textures.description: Hair part 1 diffuse

textures.name: hair_01_shade_alpha
textures.description: Hair part 1 shade/alpha

textures.name: hair_normal
textures.description: Hair normal map (shared)

textures.name: hair_02_color
textures.description: Hair part 2 diffuse

textures.name: hair_02_shade_alpha
textures.description: Hair part 2 shade/alpha

textures.name: hair_03_color
textures.description: Hair part 3 diffuse

textures.name: hair_03_shade_alpha
textures.description: Hair part 3 shade/alpha

textures.name: hair_04_color
textures.description: Hair part 4 diffuse

textures.name: hair_04_shade_alpha
textures.description: Hair part 4 shade/alpha

variants.description: Complete face/body texture sets from variant characters (E, G, I)
variants.note: These are full character variants with different art styles

notes: face_textures/ directory already has per-face-type extracted textures (8 per face: brow, eye_white, eyelash, eyeline, highlight, iris, mouth, skin)
Shape and eye parameter VRMs only vary in mesh/bone data, NOT textures (same as base)
etc/ VRMs contain full characters with hair+clothing (16 materials vs base 9)
vroid/ VRMs are fully different characters with unique art styles (18-24 materials)
Hair textures use 4 material slots (HAIR_01-04) each with color + shade/alpha + shared normal
